name: kubernetes-configs
description: Advanced Kubernetes YAML configs - Best Practices, Tips & Tricks, Production-Ready Checklist - experience from several production environments. AWS, GCP, Azure, ArgoCD, GKE, EKS, AKS, Nginx, Traefik, Kong, Cert Manager, CI/CD, Jenkins, Artifactory, TeamCity, GitHub Actions, Cloud SQL, FluxCD, Spinnaker, Selenium Grid, Moon, Helm + Kustomize
description_ja: 高度な Kubernetes YAML 設定集 — ベストプラクティス、Tips & Tricks、本番対応チェックリスト。複数の本番環境での知見を収録。AWS、GCP、Azure、ArgoCD、GKE、EKS、AKS、Nginx、Traefik、Kong、Cert Manager、CI/CD、Jenkins、Artifactory、TeamCity、GitHub Actions、Cloud SQL、FluxCD、Spinnaker、Selenium Grid、Moon、Helm、Kustomize 対応
